news.headline: Hamas urges Iran to halt attacks on Gulf, slams aggression on Tehran
news.summary: The Palestinian group calls for end to Gulf attacks while supporting Tehran’s right to defend against Israel and US.

news.headline: Meta planning sweeping layoffs as AI costs mount: report
news.summary: <p>Meta is planning sweeping layoffs that could affect 20 per cent or more of the company, three sources familiar with the matter told <em>Reuters</em>, as Meta seeks to offset costly artificial intelligence infrastructure bets and prepare for greater efficiency brought about by AI

news.headline: Surge in Oil Prices Shakes Pakistan’s Already Fragile Economy
news.summary: Families preparing for Eid al-Fitr and farmers ready for harvest are being squeezed in a country that gets nearly all its oil through the Persian Gulf.

news.headline: Aid groups warn of humanitarian crisis in Lebanon as nearly 1 million displaced by war
news.summary:
Fatima Nazha slept on the streets for two days after she and her family fled their home in Beirut’s southern suburbs following an Israeli mass evacuation order.

news.headline: Four killed in southern Lebanon apartment after reported Israeli attack
news.summary: Four killed in southern Lebanon apartment after reported Israeli attack
